resources.string: From the devastating blast of Mount St. Helens to the global reach of Hunga Tonga — test your knowledge of eruptions that shaped the modern world.
The 19th century saw some of history\'s most catastrophic volcanic events. Can you put these titans of destruction in the right order?
Venture into the age of exploration, where volcanic fury reshaped civilizations and altered global climates for years.
From the legendary Thera eruption to the medieval Samalas blast — ancient and medieval eruptions that echo through history.
Journey millions of years into the past. These prehistoric supereruptions dwarfed anything in recorded history.
The ultimate challenge. Eruptions spanning all of human history — from 41,000 BC to 2018. Only true experts survive.
Could not load game data. Please reinstall the app.
